# Align North Scottsdale

> A private studio for personal training and Pilates in North Scottsdale, Arizona. Private and duet sessions only — focused on posture, movement quality, mobility, flexibility, and lifelong health. Six certified specialists working under one roof at 33747 N. Scottsdale Rd, Suites 101 & 125.

## What we are

Align North Scottsdale is a private fitness and Pilates studio at 33747 N. Scottsdale Rd, Scottsdale, AZ 85266. We operate two adjacent suites: Suite 101 for personal training and physical therapy, Suite 125 for Pilates. Same phone, same staff, one brand. By appointment only — no walk-ins, no group classes.

Phone: (480) 766-8601
Hours: Monday–Friday 7am–6pm, Saturday by appointment, Sunday closed.

## What we do

- **Private personal training** (1-on-1 or duet) on TechnoGym Selection, FreeMotion, and a 25-foot Kinesis Wall — focused on posture, mobility, movement quality, and the strength to keep doing what you love at every age.
- **Private Pilates** (1-on-1 or duet) on reformer, mat, and apparatus — for posture, alignment, flexibility, breath, and rehabilitative work including pre/post-natal and pelvic floor.
- **Physical therapy** with a Doctor of Physical Therapy (DPT) on staff, integrated with training programs so recovery and conditioning aren't separate appointments.
- **Nutritional counseling** focused on sustainable strategy for body composition, metabolic health, and aging well.
- **Massage therapy** for recovery and movement support.

## Pricing (Pilates, single-session)

- 30-minute private: $50
- 60-minute private: $85
- Duet (two people, one instructor): $100
- 12-session package: $960
- 24-session package: $1,800

Personal training, physical therapy, nutritional counseling, and massage therapy are priced by consultation.

## Who works here

- **Rachel** — Personal Trainer. NASM-CPT, Corrective Exercise Specialist. 12 years private clients. Specialty: rebuilding strength after injury, surgery, or long breaks. Posture, gait, small stabilizers.
- **Carmen** — Personal Trainer. NSCA-CSCS, Precision Nutrition Level 1. Specialty: body composition — weight loss, muscle definition, metabolic health. Bilingual English/Spanish. 8 years private studios.
- **Laura** — Personal Trainer. ACE-CPT, Functional Aging Specialist. Specialty: clients 55+ who want to keep doing what they love. Background in orthopedic rehab.
- **Elisa** — Physical Therapist. DPT, 14 years orthopedic and post-surgical rehab. Specialty: joint replacement, rotator cuff, chronic back/knee pain. Manual therapy, dry needling, movement screening certified.
- **Viktoria** — Pilates Instructor. BASI comprehensive certification with Romana's classical lineage. Specialty: precise cueing, alignment. 12 years teaching reformer, mat, apparatus. Russian-trained dancer.
- **Evgeniya** — Pilates Instructor. PMA-Certified through Polestar. Specialty: rehabilitative and pre/post-natal Pilates, pelvic floor, core, breath. 10 years private studios across two countries.

## Service area

Primary: North Scottsdale (85266 and surrounding zip codes).
Also serving: Carefree, Cave Creek, Troon, DC Ranch, Grayhawk, Desert Mountain, Pinnacle Peak.

## Positioning

- Private and duet sessions only. We do not offer group fitness or group Pilates classes.
- Most members do both training and Pilates — strength training to build, Pilates to refine.
- Audience: clients seeking a private studio focused on posture, movement quality, mobility, flexibility, healthy aging, and rehab — work that benefits from individualized programming.
- Differentiator: physical therapy on-site and integrated with training, so recovery is not a separate appointment with a separate provider.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://alignnorth-prototype-production.up.railway.app/
- Begin Consultation (intake form): https://alignnorth-prototype-production.up.railway.app/intake.html
- Blog index: https://alignnorth-prototype-production.up.railway.app/blog
- "Private Personal Training vs Group Classes" guide: https://alignnorth-prototype-production.up.railway.app/blog/private-personal-training-vs-group-classes
- "Pilates Reformer vs Mat: A Beginner's Guide": https://alignnorth-prototype-production.up.railway.app/blog/pilates-reformer-vs-mat-guide
- "Training for Longevity: A Plain-English Guide to Moving Well at Every Age": https://alignnorth-prototype-production.up.railway.app/blog/training-for-longevity-guide

## How to book

1. Sophia, the chat assistant on the homepage (bottom-right corner), qualifies the visitor across 3 questions and routes them to a 30-minute consultation booking.
2. Direct: visit /intake.html or call (480) 766-8601.
3. The first 30 minutes are always a consultation, no commitment, before any membership or session purchase.
